description: Three independent deep generators solve only the seven development cases selected by maximum disagreement among the existing base eleven prompts.

strategies.name: Disagreement-Triggered Deep Reconstruction
strategies.description: Single-case depth is allocated only after the existing generators fail to agree at all.

stages.instruction: This case was escalated because a broad generator panel produced no repeated answer. Reconstruct it independently from first principles and return only an exactly replayable continuation.
